meta.title: The Future of Politics in an Evolving Information Ecosystem
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Peter Rough and experts Roshan Patel, Josh Holmes, and Jon Lerner for a discussion on the media and political landscape confronting policy organizations, corporations, and issue campaigns in the 2020s.
